one_time_description: Loss on disposal of investments through PFN Group of Companies LP of $4,530,883 (unrealized valuation adjustment)
economic_notes: PFN Group of Companies LP includes Pro Metal Industries Ltd (manufacturing). Paskwa Pit Stop (gas and confection). PFN Land Acquisition LP (land leases). Pasqua TLE Holdings Inc. (GBE). Pasqua Business Trust. Keseechiwan Holdings LP (8.3% ownership).
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 but audit report is dated February 27, 2025 - significant delay. Consolidated entity includes PFN Group of Companies LP (Pro Metal Industries), PFN Group of Companies Inc., Pasqua First Nation Business Trust, and Paskwa Pit Stop (2022 only). Pasqua TLE Holdings Inc. accounted for on modified equity basis (GBE). TLE Trust and Legacy Trust are excluded from consolidation. Large unrealized loss on GOC LP investments ($4,530,883). CIBC 1906 Land Claim loan proceeds of $19,079,633 recorded in prior year (2022). Long-term debt includes CMHC mortgages ($7,432,371) and other long-term debt ($11,418,224 + $775,042 current). Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($25,463,655) + CMHC programs ($826,695) + FHQ ($1,055,594) + Canadian Heritage ($88,300) + SITAG ($204,747) + SIIT ($6,600) + Touchwood C&FS ($147290) + Government of Saskatchewan ($3,750) = approximately $27,796,631 but using more conservative ISC + CMHC + other federal/provincial = $27,144,400.
